turns.user_transcript: So Fetch me the latest news.
turns.tts_text:
Latest News Report

This report consolidates recent news information, organized by source to provide a clear overview of available data.

Pew Research Center - News Media Tracker

   Focus: Provides data on how Americans use and trust news sources across various platforms.
   Content: Features an interactive tool allowing users to explore data on 30 major news sources, including awareness, regular news consumption, and trust levels, broken down by age and political party.
